markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kick off the 8-week content strategy sprint for Tavus.](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Focus on Enterprise:** The sprint will target the B2B API (CBI) business, not the consumer PALs product, to avoid diluting messaging and focus on a clearer ICP.](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=1769.0)
  - [**Urgent Content Refresh:** A top priority is fixing outdated content that causes LLMs to cite incorrect product descriptions, damaging brand perception and discoverability.](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)
  - [**Educate the Market:** The core strategy is to build a programmatic library of prescriptive use cases, educating prospects on how to apply Tavus's new technology to their business.](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=3206.0)
  - [**GrowthX Process:** The 8-week sprint uses a human-in-the-loop AI pipeline to build a scalable content system, starting with a deep dive and strategy presentation before ramping to 5 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: Outdated Content & Market Confusion

  - [Tavus's long history (since 2020) has created a large volume of outdated content that misrepresents the current product.](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [**Impact:** LLMs cite these old descriptions (e.g., "static video gen"), causing confusion, damaging brand perception, and cannibalizing discoverability.](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [**Urgency:** This "bleeding" must be stopped immediately via content refreshes, which Tavus can execute if GrowthX provides a clear plan.](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)

### The Solution: A Focused Enterprise Content Strategy

  - [**Strategic Shift:** The sprint will focus exclusively on the B2B API (Conversational Video Interface, or CBI) business.](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=1769.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The consumer PALs product is still in its infancy with an undefined ICP, making it a poor target for web acquisition.](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=1771.0)
  - [**Core Goal:** Build a programmatic library of prescriptive use cases.](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=3206.0)
      - [**Inspiration:** Webflow University's early model, which educated users on components and indexed well for SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=3235.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Teach the market how to think about and apply Tavus's new technology.](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=3206.0)

### The Product: CBI API & Competitive Edge

  - [**Product:** CBI is a real-time, low-latency API for building custom AI human experiences.](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
      - [**Positioning:** Aims to be the "11 Labs for video agents."](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [**Competitive Differentiators:**](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=2290.0)
      - [**Wins:** Superior video quality and a faster, proprietary knowledge base (RAD model) for more organic conversations.](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=2405.0)
      - [**Losses:** Price, or competitors (e.g., Anom) offering custom replica creation as a standard feature.](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=2514.0)
  - [**Key Insight:** Tavus's custom replica creation is a manual, ad-hoc process. Making it a standard feature is a high-priority engineering request to better compete.](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=2530.0)

### The Customer: Enterprise ICP & Acquisition

  - [**Primary ICP:** Product, AI, and Innovation leads (CPO down to Head of Product).](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=1910.0)
  - [**Acquisition Channels:**](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=2697.0)
      - [Website visitors with high intent.](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=2700.0)
      - ["Signal chasing" (e.g., LinkedIn followers, website visits) to feed a robust outbound motion.](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=2746.0)
      - [LinkedIn remarketing with niche, prescriptive use cases.](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=2793.0)
  - [**High-Potential Verticals:**](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=2934.0)
      - [Learning & Development (coaching, role-playing)](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=2995.0)
      - [Health Tech (patient intake, comms)](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=2832.0)
      - [Insurance](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=2960.0)
      - [Talent Acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=2974.0)
      - [Customer Support](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=2974.0)
      - [Sales Enablement](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=3021.0)

### The Process: GrowthX 8-Week Sprint

  - [**Goal:** Build a scalable, high-quality content system using a human-in-the-loop AI pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
  - [**Key Phases:**](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
      - [**Weeks 1–2 (Discovery):** Deep dives, artifact creation (ICP, tone), and CMS process review.](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
      - [**Week 2 (Strategy):** Present topic clusters and a calibration article to align on tone and quality.](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
      - [**Weeks 3–8 (Production):** Ramp to 5 articles/week (\~18–20 total), leveraging GrowthX's AI search analytics.](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=1137.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**William:**](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=3520.0)
      - [Schedule a product deep dive with Tavus.](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=3531.0)
      - [Create and share the "What We Heard" recap document.](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=3563.0)
      - [Build and send initial artifacts for review.](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=3550.0)
      - [Share the meeting recording with Tavus's new Marketing Lead, Joshua.](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=3613.0)
  - [**TARS:**](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=3520.0)
      - [Provide a list of specific enterprise ICP titles.](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=1910.0)
      - [Review and provide feedback on all GrowthX deliverables.](https://fathom.video/share/S_JPcN2zsSqdbeNxM_Wj1kZ5jvg5zdvq?tab=summary&timestamp=3559.0)
